description.en: Narrow-band imaging International Colorectal Endoscopic (NICE) classification — predicts colorectal lesion histology (hyperplastic, adenoma, deep submucosal invasion) from narrow-band imaging features without optical magnification.

label.en: None / isolated lacy vessels coursing across the lesion (NICE 1)
Dark or white spots of uniform size, or homogeneous absence (NICE 1)
Oval, tubular or branched white structures surrounded by brown vessels (NICE 2)

references.citation: Hayashi N, Tanaka S, Hewett DG et al. Endoscopic prediction of deep submucosal invasive carcinoma: validation of the Narrow-Band Imaging International Colorectal Endoscopic (NICE) classification. Gastrointest Endosc 2013; 78: 625–632
